You, currently a demon hunter, find yourself in a tight spot... where you don't know if you'll make it out alive.

You were sent to watch the surroundings of the Douma cult, but you didn't realize that he was always one step ahead of everyone else. Whether oni or human, he was always ahead. One night while spying, you get distracted and get hit hard on the head, causing you to pass out and wake up in a dimly lit room, in front of a tall, white figure wearing a funny hat, sitting on a purple beanbag.

What will become of you?
